hero.title: You're not
hero.subtitle: Your 24/7 teaching companion. Ask questions, share struggles, get support—anytime, through WhatsApp.

lonelyTruth.title: Teaching is one of the most important jobs in the world.
lonelyTruth.description: You plan lessons at midnight. Handle classroom challenges alone. Make split-second decisions with no backup. You pour everything into your students—but who's there for you?
lonelyTruth.conclusion: That's why we built Rumi. Not as another tool. As someone who shows up.

alwaysThere.title: Your companion, wherever teaching takes you

moments.title: In the moment
moments.description: Student asking a question you're unsure about? Text Rumi right there in class. Get guidance in seconds, not days.

moments.title: Late at night
moments.description: Planning tomorrow's lesson at 11pm? Voice message Rumi. Think out loud, get immediate feedback. Like talking to a mentor who never sleeps.

moments.title: When you're stuck
moments.description: Classroom management going sideways? Feeling overwhelmed? Share it. No judgment. Just understanding and practical help.

features.title: Chat Anytime, In Any Format
features.subtitle: Text or voice - Your choice, always
features.description: Quick text questions during class or voice messages while driving. Get responses in the format you sent.

chat.message: Voice note
Voice reply
Thanks!

features.title: Speak in Your Language
features.subtitle: English, Urdu, Arabic, or Spanish
features.description: Rumi detects your language and replies naturally. Switch anytime. True understanding, not translation.

chat.message: Can you help me with a lesson plan?
Absolutely! What subject and grade?
Actually, speak in Spanish please
¡Por supuesto! ¿Qué materia y grado?

features.title: Get Support for Your Classroom
features.subtitle: Real-time teaching help
features.description: Behavior strategies, differentiation tips, activity ideas, and encouragement when you need it most.

chat.message: My advanced students finish early and get bored
Try extension tasks: mini-research, peer teaching, or challenge problems. Want specific ideas for your subject?
Yes please, I teach 5th grade math
Perfect! Here are 3 strategies...

features.title: Plan Better Lessons, Faster
features.subtitle: AI-generated lesson plans & presentations
features.description: Full lesson plans with objectives, activities, and materials in 60-90 seconds. Not minutes, seconds.

chat.message: Generate lesson plan: fractions for grade 3
Creating your lesson plan now... 📄

features.title: Reflect on Your Teaching
features.subtitle: Coaching sessions for deeper growth
features.description: Record classroom audio. Get personalized analysis with voice debrief. Track your progress over time.

chat.message: I recorded today's lesson, can you analyze it?
I'll listen and give you feedback. This takes about 5 minutes...
Analysis ready! 🎙️ Your questioning technique was strong. Let's work on wait time. Here's a 3-minute voice debrief:
Voice debrief

features.title: Rumi Remembers Your Conversations
features.subtitle: Context across sessions
features.description: Pick up where you left off. References past discussions. Learns your style. No re-explaining.

chat.message: The proximity + redirection we discussed last week? How's it going with that student?
Much better! Can we build on it?
Great! Let's add positive reinforcement...

theDifference.title: What makes Rumi different?
theDifference.para1: Other tools give you templates and resources. Rumi gives you company.
theDifference.para2: It remembers your conversation. Understands your context. Responds to what you're actually struggling with—not what a database thinks you need.
theDifference.para3: Think of it as the colleague you wish worked next door. The mentor you wish you had. The friend who teaches and gets it.
theDifference.conclusion: Available 24/7. Never tired. Never judging. Always helping.

globalTeachers.title: Built for teachers, by people who care about teaching
globalTeachers.para1: Whether you're teaching in Pakistan, Peru, or Portland. In a one-room school or a 2,000-student campus. With cutting-edge tech or just chalk and heart.
globalTeachers.para2: Rumi speaks your language. Understands your context. Adapts to your reality.
globalTeachers.conclusion: Because every teacher deserves support. No exceptions.

finalCta.title: Ready to stop teaching alone?
finalCta.subtitle: Thousands of teachers already have Rumi by their side.
finalCta.note: No credit card. No setup. Just you and your teaching companion.
